subject: grammar
title: Cohesion: Referencing in an Essay
instruction: Match the sentence beginnings (a-g) to the endings (1-7) from an essay about camera invention to create coherent sentences.
passage: Prompt: 'The camera has changed the way we look at the world and the way that we celebrate special occasions.' To what extent do you agree with this statement?

questions.right: has brought many changes to our lives.
the way we see and experience the world.

questions.left: Most adults in this country have a camera these days
questions.right: and use it to create photographic records of their experiences.
more important than the event or experience it is recording?

questions.left: On important occasions such as weddings,
questions.right: cameras often have a primary role.
with the enjoyment of the occasion.

questions.left: However, it is also true that the photographs record the event
questions.right: so that it can be remembered in the future.
